name: Guacomole Pie
recipeInstructions:
1. Shred the cheeses and mix together.
2. Mash avocados with 1 tablespoon lemon juice and 1/4 cup mayonnaise.
3. Mix taco seasoning with sour cream and 1/4 cup mayonnaise.
4. Combine cheddar and Monterey Jack cheeses.
5. Layer ingredients in a dish, starting at the bottom.
6. Serve in a flat dish such as a 9-inch pie plate. The recipe can be halved to serve 10.
